subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, that He may draw him unto the station of nearness and sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین لیجذبه الی مقام القرب و القدس و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant
